requirements.task_name: Get the cheapest 4-day international shipping quote from Chicago to Paris and start a shipment
requirements.task_description: Generate a shipping quote for a 10 kg box from Chicago (60601, USA) to Paris (75001, France), filter for services that deliver in 4 business days or less, select the cheapest option, and proceed to shipment details.

requirements.task_name: Create and pay for an economy international document shipment from Toronto to New York under $40
requirements.task_description: Set up a document shipment from Toronto (M5H 2N2, Canada) to New York (10019, USA), filter for services costing $40 USD or less, choose an economy option within that price, and complete payment with a credit card.

requirements.task_name: Schedule the earliest afternoon pickup on Friday for four pre-labeled packages in Madrid
requirements.task_description: Arrange a courier pickup in Madrid (28001, Spain) for 4 already-labeled packages, choosing the earliest available pickup time slot on the upcoming Friday that starts at or after 14:00.

requirements.task_name: Estimate customs duties for clothing from Los Angeles to Tokyo and select a prepaid duties option under $60
requirements.task_description: Use the customs and duties estimator to calculate charges for sending clothing valued at $250 from Los Angeles (90001, USA) to Tokyo (100-0001, Japan), then choose a shipping option that includes prepaid duties where the estimated duties are $60 USD or less and save the estimate.

requirements.task_name: Find the nearest Berlin drop-off location open after 19:00 and save it
requirements.task_description: Locate a parcel drop-off point within 5 km of Berlin postal code 10117 that accepts international shipments and stays open at or after 20:00 on weekdays, then save it to your locations list.

requirements.task_name: Reschedule delivery to a later evening time window for an in-transit package
requirements.task_description: Use a tracking number to access an in-transit shipment and change its delivery to the third available future weekday date with an evening delivery window from 18:00–21:00 at the same address.

requirements.task_name: Create a business sender address in Shanghai and save an express shipment draft to an existing London recipient with $500 insurance
requirements.task_description: Add a new business sender address for "Dragon Exports Ltd" in Shanghai (200001, China), then use it to start an express international shipment to an existing recipient "Acme Corp, London, United Kingdom" with a declared value of $500 and insurance, saving the shipment as a draft instead of purchasing.

requirements.task_name: Choose an Amsterdam-to-Sydney service with low carbon emissions under $100
requirements.task_description: Create a quote for a 2 kg box from Amsterdam (1012 AB, Netherlands) to Sydney (2000, Australia), then filter services to those with a carbon footprint of 15 kg CO₂ or less and a price of $100 USD or less, finally selecting the fastest option that meets both criteria.
